mapper.sql: tts.train_id tt_id, tts.employee_id pe_id, tts.sign_time, tts.leave_time, tts.remarks, tts.attribute1, tts.attribute2, tts.attribute3, tts.enabled_flag, tts.id, tts.create_time, tts.create_by, tts.update_time, tts.update_by

${tAlias}.train_id as ${tAlias}_tt_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.sign_time as ${tAlias}_sign_time, ${tAlias}.leave_time as ${tAlias}_leave_time, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by

select
,
,
,
from td_train_sub tts join td_train tt on tts.train_id = tt.id and tt.enabled_flag = 1 join pm_employee pe on pe.id = tts.employee_id left outer join pm_employee_job pe_pej on pe.id = pe_pej.employee_id and pe_pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pe_pej.enabled_flag = 1
mapper.insert: insert into td_train_sub (train_id, employee_id, sign_time, leave_time, remarks, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{train.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{signTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{leaveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update td_train_sub set train_id = #{train.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, sign_time = #{signTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, leave_time = #{leaveTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
